one_time_description: Prior period restatement: share of loss from controlled entity overstated and tangible capital assets overstated due to improper capitalization of CMHC funded housing project
economic_notes: Ditidaht Economic Development Limited Partnership holds investments of ~$9.96M and other assets of ~$3.65M. Subsequent to year end, received CMHC loan of $999,467 at 3.12% under Section 95 National Housing Act. Ditidaht Forestry Limited operates forestry operations with a guaranteed NEDC loan balance of $282,788.
notes: Prior period restatement affected 2022 comparatives: long-term investments reduced by $849,347 and tangible capital assets reduced by $981,350. Two GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Ditidaht Economic Development General Partner Inc. and Ditidaht Economic Development Limited Partnership. Total government transfers estimated as sum of Nuu-Chah-Nulth Tribal Council ($5,373,630) + BCTC Contribution ($826,410) + FNES Committee ($596,071) + First Nations Health Authority ($487,499) + Government of Canada ($868,763) + Province of BC ($2,185,010) + DFO deferred revenue component. No schedule of remuneration included in statements. Subsequent event: CMHC loan of $999,467 received after year end.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
